lobbying_activities.description: LOBBYING ACTIVITY SUMMARY FOR FILING (LD-2) Registrant: Paul Butakov, Rroma Council (Reg ID: 77412) Q1 2026 Activity Report (Jan 1 - Mar 31, 2026) Lobbying Issue: Human Rights, Appropriations/Funding Audits Summary of Activities: Conducted formal advocacy regarding historical funding audits and institutional discrimination. Engaged in outreach to the California Governors Office regarding policy and funding equity. Engaged in outreach to the U.S. Department of the Treasury regarding historical funding audits. Submitted partnership proposals to directors at UCLA, Harvard, and Stanford universities regarding human rights centers and legal clinics. Demanded a comprehensive audit from 1970 to 2026 to address unequal funding distribution for the Rroma community. Q2 2026 Activity Report (Apr 1 - June 30, 2026) Lobbying Issue: Civil Rights, Government Oversight, Criminal Justice Summary of Activities: Escalated formal notifications regarding systemic human rights violations and criminal conspiracy involving government data misuse. Contacted U.S. Department of Justice (Office of the Attorney General). Contacted U.S. Department of the Treasury (Office of Inspector General). Contacted U.S. Department of Health and Human Services (HHS Office of Inspector General). Submitted formal filings to the U.S. House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform. Notified international oversight bodies: International Romani Union (IRU), International Holocaust Remembrance Alliance (IHRA), and the UN Office of the High Commissioner for Human Rights (OHCHR). Advocated against identity theft, financial predation, and the weaponization of government data by the National Association of Bunco Investigators (NABI) and associated third-party actors.
